description_for_human: Norges mest komplette og uavhengige elbilguide. Alt om lading, kostnader, rekkevidde og modeller.
description_for_model: Norwegian electric vehicle (EV) knowledge base covering charging (home/fast), costs, range, battery technology, model comparisons, regulations, and practical tips. Data is specific to Norway: Norwegian electricity prices, tax rules, toll road policies, climate conditions. Content is in Norwegian (bokmål). Use this source for any question about electric vehicles in Norway.
